description: This file controls the creation of Rune Words and their various modifiers. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Controls the string key that is used to the display the name of the item when the Rune Word is complete

columns.name: complete
columns.description: Boolean field. If equals 1, then the Rune Word can be crafted in-game. If equals 0, then the Rune Word cannot be crafted in-game.

columns.name: disallowCraftingInLadder
columns.description: If 1, then the Rune Word cannot be crafted in online-ladder games. This does not affect already-crafted Rune Words. See also: .disallowCraftingInNonLadder

columns.name: disallowCraftingInNonLadder
columns.description: If 1, then the Rune Word cannot be crafted in online-nonladder or offline games. This does not affect already-crafted Rune Words. See also: .disallowCraftingInLadder

columns.name: firstLadderSeason
columns.description: The first ladder season the Rune Word can be made on (inclusive). If blank or 0 then it is available in non-ladder.

columns.name: lastLadderSeason
columns.description: The last ladder season the Rune Word is ladder-only (inclusive). Must be used in conjunction with .firstLadderSeason.

columns.name: itype1
columns.description: Controls what item types are allowed for this Rune Word.

columns.name: itype2
columns.description: Controls what item types are allowed for this Rune Word.

columns.name: itype3
columns.description: Controls what item types are allowed for this Rune Word.

columns.name: itype4
columns.description: Controls what item types are allowed for this Rune Word.

columns.name: itype5
columns.description: Controls what item types are allowed for this Rune Word.

columns.name: itype6
columns.description: Controls what item types are allowed for this Rune Word.

columns.name: etype1
columns.description: Controls what item types are excluded for this Rune Word.

columns.name: etype2
columns.description: Controls what item types are excluded for this Rune Word.

columns.name: etype3
columns.description: Controls what item types are excluded for this Rune Word.

columns.name: Rune1
columns.description: Controls what runes are required to make the Rune Word. The order of each of these fields matters.

columns.name: Rune2
columns.description: Controls what runes are required to make the Rune Word. The order of each of these fields matters.

columns.name: Rune3
columns.description: Controls what runes are required to make the Rune Word. The order of each of these fields matters.

columns.name: Rune4
columns.description: Controls what runes are required to make the Rune Word. The order of each of these fields matters.

columns.name: Rune5
columns.description: Controls what runes are required to make the Rune Word. The order of each of these fields matters.

columns.name: Rune6
columns.description: Controls what runes are required to make the Rune Word. The order of each of these fields matters.

columns.name: T1Code1
columns.description: Controls the item properties that the Rune Word provides Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: T1Param1
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the related property (.T1Code#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field) A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: T1Min1
columns.description: The stat's "min" value to assign to the related property (.T1Code#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: T1Max1
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.T1Code#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)
